compiled_state.title: RED: Write structural + fixture test for Phase 3 tag-write step
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Implementation
Create tests/skills/test-brainstorm-tag-writer.sh with two test sections:

1. test_phase3_tag_write_step_exists (structural boundary - RED):
   - Assert '### Step 3a:' heading exists in plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
   - Assert it appears between the '### Step 3: Validate Ticket Health' heading and '### Step 3b: Write Brainstorm Completion Sentinel' heading
   - This test FAILS before Task 2 adds the step (RED)

2. test_phase3_tag_write_behavior (fixture harness):
   - Set up a stub TICKET_CMD that returns predefined tag state and records edit calls
   - Given: epic with tags ["design:approved", "scrutiny:pending", "CLI_user"]
   - When: read-merge-write commands execute (ticket show → extract tags → filter scrutiny:pending → append brainstorm:complete → ticket edit --tags=merged)
   - Then: brainstorm:complete present, scrutiny:pending absent, design:approved present, CLI_user present
   - Also test: epic with no scrutiny:pending tag still gets brainstorm:complete added (and no crash from grep -vxF || true safeguard)

Given/When/Then:
- Given: SKILL.md Phase 3 section exists with Step 3 and Step 3b headings
- When: searching for Step 3a heading between Step 3 and Step 3b
- Then: heading is found at correct position (fails before implementation)

Update .test-index: append tests/skills/test-brainstorm-tag-writer.sh [test_phase3_tag_write_step_exists] to existing plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md line.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/skills/test-brainstorm-tag-writer.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/skills/test-brainstorm-tag-writer.sh
- [ ] test_phase3_tag_write_step_exists fails before Task 2 (RED)
  Verify: run test before implementing Step 3a; structural assertion fails
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED marker for brainstorm/SKILL.md
  Verify: grep '\[test_phase3_tag_write_step_exists\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Fixture uses TICKET_CMD stub, does not call real ticket system
  Verify: grep -q 'TICKET_CMD' tests/skills/test-brainstorm-tag-writer.sh
- [ ] No grep assertions on SKILL.md prose content (only structural heading checks allowed)
  Verify: test structure verified by code review
- [ ] brainstorm:complete appears in merged tags when tags include scrutiny:pending
  Verify: test_phase3_tag_write_behavior section passes
- [ ] scrutiny:pending is absent from merged tags
  Verify: test_phase3_tag_write_behavior section passes
- [ ] Other existing tags (design:approved, CLI_user) are preserved
  Verify: test_phase3_tag_write_behavior section passes
- [ ] No-scrutiny:pending case: brainstorm:complete still added without error
  Verify: no-scrutiny:pending fixture case passes
